LanguageData.XF_BionicEye.label: Sculptor Бионический Глаз
LanguageData.XF_BionicEye.description: Sculptor Бионический Глаз revolutionary бионический vision organ, featuring ultra-high-resolution vision, продвинутый infrared и ultraviolet perception, и dynamic цель tracking. Его appearance indistinguishable от человек глаз, даже mimicking pupil responses к лёгкий, seamlessly integrating с тело.
LanguageData.XF_BionicArm.label: Sculptor Бионический Рука
LanguageData.XF_BionicArm.description: Sculptor Бионический Рука combines unmatched strength и flexibility, с nanoscale servo system для precise контроль из every движение. Его appearance mimics человек кожа и muscle texture, feeling warm и natural.
LanguageData.XF_BionicLeg.label: Sculptor Бионический Нога
LanguageData.XF_BionicLeg.description: Sculptor Бионический Нога employs продвинутый kinetic energy recovery и reinforced structural design, offering exceptional скорость и stability. Его appearance perfectly mimics человек нога, с flawless details вниз к hair и кожа texture.
LanguageData.XF_BionicSpine.label: Sculptor Бионический Spine
LanguageData.XF_BionicSpine.description: Sculptor Бионический Spine groundbreaking бионический spine с built-in neural enhancement modules, significantly boosting reaction скорость и physical coordination. Его appearance indistinguishable от real spine, seamlessly integrating с тело.
LanguageData.XF_BionicHeart.label: Sculptor Бионический Сердце
LanguageData.XF_BionicHeart.description: Sculptor Бионический Сердце high-performance бионический сердце с adaptive кровь flow regulation и energy optimization, greatly enhancing endurance и recovery скорость. Его appearance matches real сердце, даже mimicking natural heartbeat rhythms.
LanguageData.XF_BionicStomach.label: Sculptor Бионический Stomach
LanguageData.XF_BionicStomach.description: Sculptor Бионический Stomach uses продвинутый nanodecomposition technology к efficiently process various foods и nutrients, даже breaking вниз low-quality или toxic substances. Его appearance identical к real stomach, с natural feel.
LanguageData.XF_BionicEar.label: Sculptor Бионический Ear
LanguageData.XF_BionicEar.description: Sculptor Бионический Ear ultra-sensitive auditory organ с wide-frequency sound capture и directional noise cancellation, capable из precisely identifying faint sounds от distance. Его appearance indistinguishable от человек ear, с perfectly replicated details.
LanguageData.XF_BionicTongue.label: Sculptor Бионический Tongue
LanguageData.XF_BionicTongue.description: Sculptor Бионический Tongue features high-precision taste и chemical analysis modules, capable из identifying complex chemical compositions и flavors. Его appearance matches real tongue, с natural moisture и elasticity.
LanguageData.XF_BionicJaw.label: Sculptor Бионический Jaw
LanguageData.XF_BionicJaw.description: Sculptor Бионический Jaw combines immense biting strength с precise motion контроль, featuring reinforced кость structure. Его appearance identical к человек jaw, с lifelike teeth и muscle texture.
LanguageData.XF_BionicLung.label: Sculptor Бионический Lung
LanguageData.XF_BionicLung.description: Sculptor Бионический Lung high-performance respiratory organ с mechanized design, featuring stark metallic и synthetic aesthetic distinctly different от человек lungs. Equipped с продвинутый gas filtration и oxygen optimization systems, это provides stable oxygen supply в extreme environments и filters toxic gases, far surpassing traditional бионический lungs.
LanguageData.XF_BionicKidney.label: Sculptor Бионический Kidney
LanguageData.XF_BionicKidney.description: Sculptor Бионический Kidney features mechanized structure с precise metallic module и transparent conduit design, starkly contrasting человек kidneys. Equipped с nanoscale filtration system, это efficiently removes toxins и waste от кровь и includes self-regulating functions к adapt к varying metabolic needs, outperforming traditional бионический kidneys.
LanguageData.XF_BionicNerve.label: Sculptor HyperSense Nerve
LanguageData.XF_BionicNerve.description: Sculptor HyperSense Nerve продвинутый бионический neural layout, indistinguishable от человек nervous system в appearance, seamlessly integrating с тело. Equipped с overclocked neural conduction modules, это significantly enhances overall physical performance и reaction скорость, enabling unparalleled agility и coordination в high-intensity activities.
